since_last: 47% of 86 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +1.40%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 47% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.16% · BTC -2.59% · Gold -0.87% · Nasdaq100 -3.00%. 47% of 86 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +1.40%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +1.40%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -6.83%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MU is the standout at -12.64%
cards.body: Leaders: IBM +4.75%, NOW +4.34%, NET +4.27%, SPCX +4.03%, CHKP +3.39%. Laggards: MU -12.64%, VRT -10.50%, KLAC -9.52%, LRCX -9.39%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +4.03% at $160.84
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +4.03% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
